scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/media-container build && pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/webcodecs-avif build && pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/webcodecs-color build && pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/exif-transplant build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/media-container build && pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/webcodecs-avif build && pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/webcodecs-color build && pnpm --filter @browser-avif-lab/exif-transplant build
scripts.test:electron: pnpm build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE xvfb-run -a node test/electron-smoke.mjs
